files.patch:
@@ -131,7 +131,7 @@ jobs:
   build-preview:
     name: Build & Push PR Preview Image
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: [check_changes]   # no longer blocks on ci
+    needs: [check_changes] # no longer blocks on ci
     if: github.event.action != 'closed'
     permissions:
       contents: read
@@ -192,7 +192,7 @@ jobs:
           path: .
 
       # fallback: rebuild locally if there were no relevant changes
-      - name: Fallback: build app for preview
+      - name: Fallback - build app for preview
         if: steps.check_access.outputs.authorized == 'true' && needs.check_changes.outputs.has_changes != 'true'
         run: |
           echo "No relevant file changes — performing fresh build for preview."
